dice_system: 5d6 pool + stat modifier vs DC. Each item = +1d6. Tier adds to stat score.

burnwillow.name: Burnwillow — Autumn (Default)
burnwillow.description: The dying hearth. Fire-leaves in perpetual crimson. The Blight rose first here. Emberhome clings to the mid-trunk.
burnwillow.theme: Harvest and decay. Scarcity, sacrifice, community warmth against encroaching darkness.

verdhollow.name: Verdhollow — Spring
verdhollow.description: Uncontrolled growth. Everything blooms too fast, too wild. Vines strangle paths between visits.
verdhollow.theme: Abundance as threat. The terror of plenty. Life without restraint.

solheart.name: Solheart — Summer
solheart.description: Burning from the outside in. Crown fires. Drought in the roots. Desert-pragmatists who waste nothing.
solheart.theme: Excess and endurance. The forge-heat of peak power. Glory and its cost.

ashenmere.name: Ashenmere — Winter
ashenmere.description: A tree that has stopped entirely. No Root-Song. No sap flow. Crystalline, ice-encased. The Choir's first test.
ashenmere.theme: Stillness and forgetting. Preservation vs. stagnation. The beauty of death.

heartwood.name: The Heartwood — Within
heartwood.description: The First Tree. Concentric growth rings. The Arborists' most sacred space. The Silent Culture survives here.
heartwood.theme: Memory and origin. The answers to every question the setting has raised.

undergrove.name: The Undergrove — Below
undergrove.description: The root network beneath all Groves. Where the Rot is native. Where An Cór Briste directs the decay.
undergrove.theme: Death and recycling. The necessary process everyone fears.

mechanics.stat_generation: 4d6 drop lowest per stat. Gear adds to stat SCORE (not modifier). D&D formula: (score - 10) // 2.
mechanics.dice_pool: Each equipped item = +1d6 to its stat pool, capped at 5d6. Roll pool + stat modifier vs DC.
mechanics.progression: Gear-based (no leveling). Power scales with equipment tier and build synergy.
mechanics.passive_threshold: If Total Modifier + 1 >= DC, auto-succeed without rolling.
mechanics.assistance: Ally grants +1d6 to roll (subject to 5d6 cap). One helper per check.
mechanics.root_resonance: Universal capacity to perceive Aether. Awakens through exposure. Spectrum: Dormant → Stirring → Resonant → True Arborist.
mechanics.tpk: Total Party Kill = full campaign reset. No Memory Seeds, no meta_state.
mechanics.cultural_tradition: Norse/Gaelic. Old Tongue (Rótgaldr, An Cogar, An Cór Briste) for Heartwood Descendants and The Choir. Common for surface.
